title: WhatsApp Chat Widget

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.name: whatsapp_phone
fields.instructions: International format without + or spaces (e.g. 4917612345678). Leave empty to hide the widget.

fields.label: Default Message
fields.name: whatsapp_message
fields.instructions: Pre-filled message when visitor opens the chat.
fields.default_value: Hi! I visited your website and would like to get in touch.

fields.label: Contact Name
fields.name: whatsapp_contact_name
fields.instructions: Name shown in the chat bubble (e.g. Felix).

fields.label: Contact Role
fields.name: whatsapp_contact_role
fields.instructions: Short role or title (e.g. Web Developer).

fields.label: Header Text
fields.name: whatsapp_header_text
fields.instructions: Title shown in the chat popup header.

description: WhatsApp floating chat button settings. Leave phone empty to disable.
